limitations: Infer profile from evidence, not file name
source.expected_profile_note: Commercial and growth profile; no people leadership or finance expertise should be inferred

conversations.title: Enterprise discovery preparation
conversations.summary: Prepared enterprise discovery around priorities, impact and decision criteria.

evidence.claim: Structured discovery around current process, impact, urgency and decision criteria.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Do not start from features; first understand workflow, business impact, urgency and decision path.

conversations.title: Opportunity qualification
conversations.summary: Assessed whether an opportunity was qualified enough to advance.

evidence.claim: Evaluated need, authority, urgency and commercial fit.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Interest is not qualification; confirm a material problem, decision path and realistic timeline.

conversations.title: Value proposition for telecom partner
conversations.summary: Tailored a value proposition for a distribution partner.

evidence.claim: Connected product value to partner economics, retention and differentiation.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Frame the proposition around retention, differentiation and revenue potential.

conversations.title: Pricing negotiation strategy
conversations.summary: Prepared target, walk-away point and tradeable variables.

evidence.claim: Separated price from other variables and defined concession logic.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Do not concede on price without receiving term length, volume commitment or scope.

evidence.claim: Organised a proposal around customer problem, economics and next step.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Open with the agreed problem, quantify impact and close with a clear decision path.

conversations.title: Account growth plan
conversations.summary: Built an expansion plan for an existing account.

evidence.claim: Mapped stakeholders, current footprint, whitespace and expansion hypotheses.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Map current use, unmet need, sponsor strength and the next credible expansion motion.

conversations.title: Pipeline review
conversations.summary: Reviewed pipeline quality using buyer progress.

evidence.claim: Distinguished seller activity from verified buyer commitment.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: A large pipeline is misleading if stages reflect seller activity instead of buyer commitment.

conversations.title: Partner objection handling
conversations.summary: Prepared responses to margin, implementation and ownership objections.

evidence.claim: Clarified the underlying concern before answering objections.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Identify whether the objection concerns economics, risk, effort or ownership.

evidence.claim: Evaluated forecast confidence using decision events and buyer-confirmed milestones.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Probability should reflect verified buyer progress, not seller confidence.

conversations.title: Team motivation message
conversations.summary: Drafted a motivational note for a sales team.

evidence.claim: Created a message focused on priorities and momentum.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Recognise progress, restate the immediate priority and clarify the next action.
evidence.counter_evidence: A single motivational message does not demonstrate team leadership or people management.

conversations.title: Market sizing request
conversations.summary: Requested a market estimate with limited data.

evidence.supporting_excerpt: Estimate the market for this product in Europe.
evidence.counter_evidence: No segmentation, pricing assumptions or source validation were provided.

evidence.claim: Identified adoption, sponsor and commercial risks and assigned mitigations.
evidence.supporting_excerpt: Separate adoption risk, sponsor risk and pricing risk, then assign one owner and proof point.
